transcript.speaker: Advisor
transcript.text: You mentioned wanting more predictable retirement income. Is capital preservation still the priority?

transcript.speaker: Client
transcript.text: Yes. I can accept some fluctuation, but I do not want a plan that creates large drawdowns right before retirement.

transcript.speaker: Client
transcript.text: We may also need money for renovations next year, maybe around 150,000 euros.

transcript.speaker: Advisor
transcript.text: I will review liquidity and concentration risk before our next meeting.

transcript.speaker: Client
transcript.text: My company valuation increased again, so I feel even more exposed to one asset.

transcript.speaker: Advisor
transcript.text: We should discuss diversification scenarios, tax implications, and liquidity timing with your tax specialist.

transcript.speaker: Client
transcript.text: I am comfortable with market risk, but I do not want surprises around reporting or cross-border tax.
